explanation: The diagram shows multiple bidirectional/circular call paths among core services, indicating clear cycles rather than a strict DAG. In particular, Gate depends on several backend services, while downstream services (e.g., Orca/Clouddriver/Front50/Fiat and Keel/Echo/Igor cluster) also have interdependencies that form closed loops. This creates at least one circular dependency chain involving more than two services, so cyclic dependency is clearly present.
